arest.description: AREST engine — FORML2 readings → REST API. Tools: apply / compile / propose / query / audit / verify, plus a built-in sandboxed tutor (tutor + tutor.* tools) that runs orthogonal to your active app. Configure your personal scope via shell env: AREST_CLI (path to arest-cli for CLI/SQLite persistence), AREST_DB, and AREST_READINGS_DIR (or AREST_APPS_DIR + AREST_APP for the app registry). For remote-worker mode, set AREST_MODE=remote plus AREST_URL and AREST_API_KEY. Without any of these, the server runs in WASM mode against the bundled metamodel.
